words.exampleSentence: The exam was a piece of cake for her.

words.meaning: To start a conversation in a social setting

words.word: Hit the nail on the head

words.word: Cost an arm and a leg

words.word: Kill two birds with one stone

words.meaning: To make a bad situation worse

words.word: At the drop of a hat

words.meaning: To argue an opposing view for discussion

words.word: Every cloud has a silver lining

words.meaning: To face the consequences of your actions

words.meaning: To stay positive in a tough situation

Horror movies are not my cup of tea.

words.meaning: To improvise or decide as you go

words.meaning: The final problem that causes a breakdown

words.meaning: To be very careful around someone

words.meaning: A bad event that turns out to be good

words.meaning: What you do is more important than what you say

words.meaning: To be upset about something that cannot be fixed

words.word: Don't put all your eggs in one basket

words.word: Wear your heart on your sleeve
